overview: The Department of Architecture in the Faculty of Engineering at Daffodil International University aims at a curriculum befitting the contemporary information technology and to produce skilled architects. The program's undergraduate level is broad based covering the shared values and expertise of other departments in the university, while gradually building on its own specialization.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (SSC and HSC/undergraduate), Waiver on SGPAs (semester result), Female quota, Need-based waiver, Player quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU Alumni, Freedom fighter quota, Talent scholarship program, Special waiver for international students
eligibility: Having minimum 2.5 GPA both in Secondary School Certificate (SSC) and Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) with a total GPA of 7.00 and having minimum 'C' grade in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics and English.
